features: The Rexona Men Sport Defense anti-perspirant spray protects against sweat and odours for a long time.
description: Product description Rexona MotionSense Men Deospray Antiperspirant "Sport Defence" - 150 ml The Rexona Men Sport Defence anti-perspirant spray protects against sweat and odours for a long time. A fresh, very masculine scent. Dermatologically tested, skin-friendly, alcohol-free. Antiperspirant for men. Directions Track and dry the forearms before application, spray a thin, even layer on the forearms, let it dry before putting on clothes and repeat as needed during the day or after physical activity.
